notes: pnpm audit failure: 1 moderate vulnerability in transitive dep ip-address (GHSA-v2v4-37r5-5v8g). Small log (158 lines, the smallest v2 case so far). Not flaky — the CVE is real and will keep failing audit until ip-address is bumped.
